description: Determines the copy number of a target SNP
author: David Twomey and Joshua Gould
plan:
## CopyNumberDivideByNormals GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
CopyNumberDivideByNormals is a GenePattern module that Determines the copy number of a target SNP

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: sample.info.file, include.genotype.calls, output.file.name
- Optional: snp.file

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>snp.jar<path.separator><libdir>opencsv-1.7.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-modules.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-math-1.2.jar<path.separator><libdir>Jama-1.0.1.jar<path.separator><libdir>log4j-1.2.13.jar org.genepattern.modules.DivideByNormals.DivideByNormals <snp.file> <sample.info.file> <output.file.name> <include.genotype.calls>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: snp.file
parameters.description: SNP file containing both normal and target samples.

parameters.name: sample.info.file
parameters.description: dChip format sample info file containing Ploidy(numeric) and Sample columns

parameters.name: include.genotype.calls
parameters.description: Whether to include genotype calls from the input snp file if they exist.
